# Dhanikesh Karunanithi (Dhani)

> Global Head of Learning Technology, Practice & Data Strategy at Foundever. Founder of Sudar and ByteVerse. Executive leader at the intersection of enterprise L&D, AI transformation, and open-source EdTech.

## Canonical site

- https://dhanikeshkarunanithi.com

## Identity

- Full name: Dhanikesh Karunanithi
- Known as: Dhani
- Title: Global Head of Learning Technology, Practice & Data Strategy
- Organization: Foundever
- Location: Global (50+ countries)

## Expertise

- AI transformation and digital transformation for enterprise L&D
- AI consultation and AI-enabled education at scale (150K+ employees)
- Learning technology platforms, learning analytics, and data strategy
- Open-source EdTech: Sudar (AI-native learning OS), ByteVerse (AI microlearning factory)
- Enterprise implementations: Spark LXP, AI onboarding pilots, global COE optimization

## Awards & recognition

- 2× Gold Stevie Awards (2024) — HR Innovation & Technology
- Brandon Hall Gold & Silver (2022) — Excellence in L&D
